title: Jacko's Bossified Weapons
description: Ever wanted more uses for the vanilla bosses other than access to elytras and crafting beacons?
body:
# Notice:

This mod is currently under the process of being rewritten in actual code using intellij idea, on fabric 1.20.1 due to some of the limitations of mcreator.

**As of now the major weapons added are:**
- Withering Harvest
- Sculk Tuning Fork


## Weapons:

### **Withering harvest:**
- A scythe that functions as a hoe but also is compatible with sword enchantments, it inflicts mobs it hits with wither 1 for 4 seconds, and also has 2 exclusive enchantments to amplify its offensive capabilities.

**enchants:**
- Potency; inflicts wither 3 on targets for 8 seconds.
- Skull shot; no longer inflicts wither upon hit, instead, right clicking shoots 4 wither skulls the last one being a blue wither skull.
- Withered slashing; fires a slash of particles that damages any entity it hits and inflicts them with wither and weakness.


### **Sculk tuning fork:**
- A tuning fork that functions as a sword but mainly uses its tunes as its offensive and defensive capabilities.

**enchants:**
- Siphon; siphons xp from hit entities.
- Marking; Inflicts mark of the sculk to hit targets.
- Sculk resonance; increases damage proportional to the amount of xp of the user.
- Soul surge; only obtained by hitting an entity that has the mark of the sculk effect, allows the user to riptide once per level.


## Tuning fork tunes:
- Pacify; pacifies entities, hindering their ability to attack the user.
- Clarity; removes all negative effects, and makes the user immune to being inflicted negative effects.
- Battle Chime; increase attack speed, attack damage, and movement speed.
- Engulf; engulfs entities in fire, can not be extinguished until the effect ends.
- Disorient; makes entities unable to move.

# Credits

**Sprites & Code:**
